_readme: IMI Guard case record (chain of custody). Fill this in BEFORE running the audit. These values are printed on the report cover and written into evidence_manifest.json alongside the SHA-256 of every output file. An unauthorized-use report can end up in an HR or disciplinary process, where the first question is 'who produced this, when, and under whose authority?' - this file is the answer.
_optional: Everything below is optional but strengthens the record if the findings are ever disputed.
